## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss Ramp's content performance, vendor pages progress, and next steps for various content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance across various page types (block, end, expense category, tuning, treasury) shows minor fluctuations but no major concerns](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Vendor pages production is ongoing, with teamwork pages ready for publishing and Microsoft Project pages on hold due to product changes](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [API access to Sanity CMS is being explored to streamline content publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Editorial blog content ready for review; Matt to provide additional brand voice/tone guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Block pages: No major variations; slight decrease in sessions, but within normal range](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [End pages: Drop in sessions and views, but no significant SERP or ranking changes](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Flattened growth curve; slight dip in sessions](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Clicks and sessions decreased; "God" page top performer](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Treasury pages: "Liquidity positions report" performed well, driving overall view increase](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Steady clicks; CRM pages received first clicks (Asana, Jira, Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### Vendor Pages Production

  - [Teamwork parent and child pages (5) ready for publishing on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [CMS formatting issues caused slight delay](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Exploring API access to Sanity for direct publishing](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Luke to consult WebEng team about API integration for both Ramp and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Content generation process improved: all elements generated upfront, then assembled in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)

### Microsoft Project Product Change

  - [Recent change from "Project" to "Planner" flagged](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Team to assess impact on existing content and data](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Victoria to review data pertaining to the new product](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Microsoft-related vendor pages put on hold; team to proceed with second batch of vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### Editorial Blog Content

  - [Matt to review first 5 blog posts for trends and prompt improvements](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Matt to share additional brand voice/tone guidelines from Aero brand kit](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### Content Publishing Automation

  - [GrowthX engineering team exploring automation of publishing flows](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Vivek to have team draft a plan for API integration with Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Luke emphasized need to ensure mistake-free publishing process (e.g., creating drafts for review before publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to check impact of Microsoft Project change on existing content and update via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Matt to send custom instructions for brand voice/tone](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [GrowthX to swap out Microsoft vendor pages for second batch provided by Victoria](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [GrowthX to send sample logs of editorial content to Matt for review](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Vivek to have engineering team draft Sanity API integration plan](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Continue production of vendor pages based on Victoria and Matt's status updates](https://fathom.video/share/qs62gjVqCGQmk3dyx65LVEYi7swW-Es-?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
